author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.6.0
body:
# [5.6.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.5.0...v5.6.0) (2019-05-15)

### Bug Fixes

* **connectQueryRules:** avoid to throw an error with undefined values ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2436](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2436)) ([f847bda](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f847bda))

### Features

* **infiniteHits:** add previous button ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2296](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2296)) ([3d3dacc](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/3d3dacc))
